title: SO 3444 (E), dated 18.11.13 - Apointment of Shri Justice Umesh Dattatraya Salvi, Judge of Bombay High Court, as the Judicial Member of the NGT w.e.f 14.02.2013 for a period of 5 years

MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 18th November, 2013 S.O. 3444(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of Section 6 and read with Section 7 of the National Green Tribunal Act, 2010(19 of 2010), the Central Government hereby appoints Shri Justice Umesh Dattatraya Salvi, Judge of Bombay High Court, as the Judicial Member of the National Green Tribunal with effect from the 14th February, 2013 for a period of five years or till he attains the age of sixty- seven years, whichever is earlier. [F. No. 17(30)/2012-PL/NGT (Vol. IV)] SURJIT SINGH, Jt. Secy. -- 1 of 1 --
